📊 Business Intelligence

Dashboards, SQL explorers, and embedded analytics — open source alternatives to Tableau, Power BI and Looker.

Popular SaaS in this category

Tap any tool to see curated open source alternatives with honest strengths and weaknesses.

Alternatives to Tableau

Salesforce-owned enterprise BI and visualization platform.

3 alternatives

Alternatives to Microsoft Power BI

Microsoft's BI suite bundled with Fabric and M365.

3 alternatives
Ad slot — category middle

Open source projects in this category

Apache Superset

Modern data exploration and dashboarding platform from Airbnb/Apache.

License: Apache-2.0 Self-host: ★★★★☆

Metabase

Friendly BI tool aimed at non-SQL users asking questions of data.

License: AGPL-3.0 (Community) / commercial (Enterprise, Pro) Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Redash

SQL-first analytics platform with dashboards and alerts.

License: BSD-2-Clause Self-host: ★★★☆☆

Tools for personal notes, wikis, and knowledge management — replacing Notion, Evernote, and friends with self-hosted or open source alternatives.

Chat, messaging, and voice platforms for teams — open source replacements for Slack, Discord, and WhatsApp.

OpenInstead — open source alternatives to the SaaS you already use. Updated May 2026.
